data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for package delivery photo capture.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo capture at delivery points, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The prior steps do not address the requirement for photo capture or related functionalities, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of this requirement, it cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of photo capture functionality at delivery points.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
